title: Simple Clear Glass Single Dinner Candle Stick Holder h6cm
features: Very simple but very elegant small dinner candle holders.
Ideal for the centre of tables, on window sils and on fireplace mantles.

SAFETY WARNING - As per standard guidance never allow a candle to burn down to holder. Snuff out 1cm before. Never leave a candle unattended. Keep AWAY from children and pets. Only to be used by competent person.
description: Very simple but very elegant small dinner candle holders. Ideal for the centre of tables, on window sils and on fireplace mantles. Measurements: Width 50mm Height 60mm Depth 50mm
